message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 30
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor User

participant "«analysis»\nEditVariablesUI" as EditUI
participant "«analysis»\nUIController" as UIC
participant "«analysis»\nw: Workbook" as W
participant "«analysis»\nlist: List<Variable>" as L
participant "«analysis»\nVariable" as V

User -> EditUI : Edit variables
EditUI -> UIC : w = getActiveWorkbook()
EditUI -> W : list = getVariables()

loop
L -> EditUI : addItem(Variable)
end

User -> EditUI : Selects a variable and\nchanges the value
EditUI -> V : setValue(newValue)

@enduml
```
